seoTitle: How to Use Canva Text to Speech
metaDescription: Learn how to convert written text into spoken audio using Canva's text-to-speech feature for voiceovers, presentations, and e-learning.
intro: Canva's text-to-speech feature turns written content into spoken audio, which is useful for voiceovers, presentations, and e-learning materials. This tutorial covers accessing the feature, choosing a voice style, and applying it to real projects.

steps.heading: Access the text-to-speech feature
steps.body: Find where the text-to-speech tool is located within Canva's editor.

steps.heading: Choose voice styles and accents
steps.body: Select from available voice options to match the tone of your project.

steps.heading: Adjust speech settings
steps.body: Fine-tune pacing and other settings so the generated audio sounds natural.

steps.heading: Apply it to practical projects
steps.body: See how this feature works for voiceovers, presentations, and e-learning content.

faq.question: What can text-to-speech be used for in Canva?
faq.answer: Common use cases include voiceovers for promotional videos, presentations, and e-learning materials.

faq.question: Do I need audio editing experience to use this feature?
faq.answer: No, the user-friendly interface ensures even those without prior audio editing experience can produce professional results.

faq.question: Can I choose different voice styles or accents?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial covers tips for selecting different voice styles and accents to fit your project.

faq.question: Does this save time compared to recording your own voiceover?
faq.answer: Yes, automating the speech generation process lets you focus more on your creative ideas rather than technical audio work.
